narrative:
Bowling Green 3-B (precinct in Wood County) has 359 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.9 percentage points.
